title: papaver chelidoniifolium
intro: Papaver chelidoniifolium, also known as the "Poppy of the Daphne Leaf," is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Papaver chelidoniifolium include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea or tincture, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
